creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
> Old Synopsis: open-vmware-guestd sets date to past at startup at ESX 3.5
> New Synopsis: emulators/open-vm-tools-nox11 - open-vmware-guestd sets date
> to past at startup at ESX 3.5
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=124531

Please close the call.
The time sync works as expected.

Problem was a fresh installed ESX-Cluster Member, w.o. accurate timesync.

At the moment I installed the tools, set 'kern.hz=100' in /boot/loader.conf an rebooted 
the VM was started at the new Cluster member (those w.o. accurate time sync).

Sorry for the noice.

Kind Regards,
 olli hauer

--
